executives.name: Mike Henry
executives.background: Mike Henry has over 30 years' experience in the resources industry. He joined BHP in 2003 and has held various senior roles including President Operations Minerals Australia and President Coal. He was appointed Chief Executive Officer in January 2020.

executives.name: Vandita Pant
executives.background: Vandita Pant was appointed Chief Financial Officer in March 2024. She previously served as Chief Commercial Officer and has extensive experience in banking and finance across Asia and Europe.

executives.name: Rag Udd
executives.background: Rag Udd was appointed Chief Commercial Officer in March 2024. He was previously President Americas and has held several leadership roles in operations and technology since joining BHP in 1997.

executives.name: Brandon Craig
executives.background: Brandon Craig was appointed President Americas in March 2024. He previously served as Asset President Western Australia Iron Ore and has been with BHP since 1999.

tenure_dates.title: Asset President Western Australia Iron Ore

executives.name: Anna Wiley
executives.background: Anna Wiley was appointed President Australia in July 2024. She previously served as Asset President Western Australia Iron Ore and has extensive experience in mining operations.

executives.name: Alan Pangbourne
executives.background: Mr. Pangbourne has over 35 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior executive roles at Guyanese Gold Corp and Kinross Gold Corporation.

executives.name: Alberto Calderon
executives.background: Alberto Calderon was appointed CEO of AngloGold Ashanti in September 2021. He was previously CEO of Orica and has held senior executive roles at BHP, including Group Executive and Chief Commercial Officer.

executives.name: Andre Liebenberg
executives.background: Andre has over 30 years of experience in the resources industry. He was previously at BHP where he held various senior roles including Acting President of Energy Coal and Head of Group Investor Relations. Prior to BHP, he was at UBS in London and Old Mutual in South Africa.

tenure_dates.title: Various senior executive roles, including CFO of Energy Coal, Acting President of Energy Coal, and Head of Group Investor Relations.

executives.name: Anita Frew
executives.background: Anita Frew was appointed Chair of Rolls-Royce in October 2021. She has extensive experience as a chair and non-executive director across various sectors including chemicals, engineering, and finance. She is also Chair of Croda International Plc.

executives.name: Christine O'Reilly
executives.background: Christine O'Reilly has over 30 years' experience in financial and infrastructure sectors. She was previously CEO of the GasNet Group and Co-Head of Unlisted Infrastructure at Colonial First State Global Asset Management.

executives.name: Dean Dalla Valle
executives.background: Dean joined the Board in 2022. He has 40 years of experience in the resources sector, including senior roles at BHP and as CEO of Pacific National.

executives.name: Edgar Basto
executives.background: Edgar Basto was appointed Chief Operating Officer in October 2022. He has been with BHP since 1989 and has held numerous leadership positions including President Minerals Australia and President Western Australia Iron Ore.

tenure_dates.title: Various senior leadership roles (including Asset President Western Australia Iron Ore, Asset President Escondida, VP Global HSEC)

executives.name: Jonathan Price
executives.background: Jonathan Price was appointed President and Chief Executive Officer in September 2022. He previously served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer from October 2020 to September 2022. Before joining Teck, he was with BHP for 14 years in various senior roles including Chief Transformation Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President Finance / Vice President Investor Relations

executives.name: Ken MacKenzie
executives.background: Ken MacKenzie was appointed Chairman in September 2017. He was formerly the Managing Director and CEO of Amcor Limited. He has extensive global experience in complex manufacturing and supply chains.

executives.name: Michael Chaney AO
executives.background: Mr Chaney is currently Chairman of Wesfarmers Limited and was previously Chairman of Woodside Petroleum and National Australia Bank. He was Managing Director of Wesfarmers from 1992 to 2005.

executives.name: Michelle Hinchliffe
executives.background: Michelle Hinchliffe was a partner at KPMG for 36 years, where she held several leadership roles including UK Chair of Audit. She has extensive experience in auditing and financial services.

executives.name: Peter Wasow
executives.background: Peter Wasow has over 30 years' experience in the resources and energy sectors. He was previously the Managing Director and CEO of Alumina Limited and held senior executive roles at Santos Limited and BHP. He has extensive experience in financial management, strategy, and corporate governance.

executives.name: Terry Bowen
executives.background: Terry Bowen is a former Finance Director of Wesfarmers Limited. He has over 25 years' experience in senior financial and executive roles across various industries.

executives.name: Dion Weisler
executives.background: Dion J. Weisler has been a director since 2020. He was President and CEO of HP Inc. from 2015 to 2019.

executives.name: Gerard Bond
executives.background: Mr. Bond was appointed President and CEO in April 2022. He has over 25 years of experience in the global financial and resources industry, including 10 years at Newcrest Mining as CFO and several senior executive roles at BHP.

tenure_dates.title: Various senior executive roles (including Deputy CFO of Aluminium, CFO and Acting President of Nickel, and Head of Group Human Resources)

executives.name: Ian Cockerill
executives.background: Ian Cockerill has over 45 years of experience in the global natural resources industry. He previously served as CEO of Gold Fields and Anglo Coal, and was a non-executive director of Endeavour since 2019 before being appointed CEO.

executives.name: Johan van Jaarsveld
executives.background: Johan van Jaarsveld was appointed Chief Technical Officer in September 2024. He previously served as Chief Development Officer and has a background in investment banking and resources strategy.

executives.name: Lassina Zerbo
executives.background: Dr. Zerbo is the former Executive Secretary of the Comprehensive Nuclear-Test-Ban Treaty Organization (CTBTO) and has served as the Prime Minister of Burkina Faso. He is a renowned expert in nuclear non-proliferation and international diplomacy.

executives.name: Michael Anglin
executives.background: Lead Independent Director. Former executive at BHP Billiton with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President of Operations and Chief Operating Officer (Base Metals Group)

executives.name: Michelle Du Plessis
executives.background: Ms. Du Plessis joined OceanaGold in 2022. She has over 20 years of experience in human resources and organizational development within the mining and resources sector.

tenure_dates.title: Various operational and strategic roles (including Global HR operations)

executives.name: Shaun Verner
executives.background: Shaun Verner is a mining executive with over 30 years of experience in the resources industry. Prior to joining Syrah, he held senior roles at BHP, including in marketing, sales, and strategy. He has extensive experience in international markets and commodity trading.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Marketing (Coal and Base Metals)

executives.name: Vicky Binns
executives.background: Ms. Binns has over 35 years’ experience in the global resources and financial services sectors, including 10 years at BHP in senior executive roles.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Leadership Roles (various, including Vice President Minerals Marketing)

executives.name: Xiaoqun Clever
executives.background: Xiaoqun Clever has over 20 years' experience in technology and digital transformation. She has held senior executive roles at SAP SE and Ringier AG.

board_of_directors.name: Ken MacKenzie
board_of_directors.background: Ken MacKenzie was appointed Chairman in September 2017. He was formerly the Managing Director and CEO of Amcor Limited. He has extensive global experience in complex manufacturing and supply chains.
